En: I wish I was fucking dead. Fuck you, fuck you.
Zh: “我真他妈希望自己要死了。去你妈的，操。”

En: Nothing you can say would make you feel any better now...
Zh: 现在你说什么也不会让感觉变得好起来……

En: I'm done. No one even likes cops.
Zh: “我不干了。根本没人喜欢警察。”

En: Despair creeps into you, getting fat on your weakness. Whatever noble intentions you once had as a police officer -- it's eating them all up now.
Zh: 绝望渐渐爬进你的心底，因为你的软弱愈发膨胀。不论作为一名警察的你曾经有过多么崇高的意愿——现在都变成了它的食粮。

En: There's something else in there. There has to be. But -- it's like reaching your hand into muddy water, fishing around, and coming up with nothing...
Zh: 还有些什么东西。肯定有什么。但是——就像把手伸进泥水中一样，不论怎么四下翻找，还是什么都没有……

En: Yes, it can be difficult to be on the receiving end of so much distrust and outright hatred, he says with a sad half-smile.
Zh: “是啊，承受这么多的怀疑和赤裸裸的仇恨真的很难，”他露出悲伤的微笑。

En: You're still coming up with sentences. That's a step up from total annihilation, right?
Zh: 你还在组织语言。这是离完全的毁灭又近了一步，是吗？

En: I'm seriously running out of shits to give. Let corpses hang on trees! I'm quitting. Fuck you.
Zh: “我真他妈什么办法也没了。就让尸体挂在树上吧！我不干了。去你妈的。”

En: I'm seriously running out of shits to give, Kim. Fuck you.
Zh: “我真的没什么好说的了，金。去死吧你。”

En: Yeah, I'm pretty sure you're shit out of luck *fishing around* right now. You're drowning.
Zh: 是啊，我很肯定你的*搜查*运走到尽头了。你已经被水淹没不知所措了。

En: Fuck me? Please leave the *rage* you have for after we finish the investigation.
Zh: “去你妈的？请等到我们的调查结束之后再发泄你的*怒火*吧。”

En: Fuck me? I understand this is by no means an easy investigation, but...
Zh: “叫我去死？我理解这次调查一点也不轻松，不过……”

En: I've wasted my life protecting humans. They don't deserve it.
Zh: “保护人类简直就是浪费我的生命。他们不值得。”

En: I don't dispute that you have been charged with protecting the people of a particularly... challenging district. But poverty does not make one a loser -- poverty is just... poverty.
Zh: “我不否认，你确实被指控过，而且是因为保护这里的人，这个……很有挑战性地方的人。但是贫穷不会让人变成废材——贫穷只是……贫穷而已。”

En: He watches your meltdown stoically from behind the lenses of his glasses.
Zh: 他透过鼻梁上的眼镜片，恬淡地看着你陷入崩溃。

En: Too late for that. So whatcha gonna do now? Skewer yourself?
Zh: “现在已经太迟了。所以你打算怎么做？狠狠地嘲笑自己？”

En: Cuno don't give a shit about your shits.
Zh: “坤诺才不管你那张臭嘴说出的屁话。”

En: That you are a loser, Cuno doesn't doubt, but why go around whining about it?
Zh: “你是个废材，坤诺完全不怀疑这一点，但是你为什么还要到处抱怨呢？”

En: Cuno knew the pig was a f****t.
Zh: “坤诺知道这头猪是个狗娘养的杂种。”

En: I wish I was fucking dead. Fuck you, fuck you Cuno.
Zh: “我真他妈希望自己要死了。还有你，坤诺，去死吧你。”

En: I'm done. No one even likes cops.
Zh: “我不干了。根本没人喜欢警察。”

En: I'm seriously running out of shits to give. Let corpses hang on trees! I'm quitting.
Zh: “我真他妈什么办法也没了。就让尸体挂在树上吧！我不干了。”

En: I'm seriously running out of shits to give, Cuno. I'm quitting.
Zh: “我真的没什么好说的了，坤诺。老子不干了。”

En: I've wasted my life protecting humans. They don't deserve it.
Zh: “保护人类简直就是浪费我的生命。他们不值得。”

En: Fuck Martinaise, fuck Revachol. And fuck me. I'm done.
Zh: 去他妈的马丁内斯，去他妈的瑞瓦肖。还有我自己。老子不干了。

En: I'm done. No one even likes cops.
Zh: 我不干了。根本没人喜欢警察。

En: I've wasted my life protecting humans. They don't deserve it.
Zh: “保护人类简直就是浪费我的生命。他们不值得。”

En: I'm seriously running out of shits to give. To hell with it.
Zh: “我真他妈什么办法也没了。见鬼去吧。”

En: I'm seriously running out of shits to give. To hell with all of this.
Zh: 我真的没什么好说的了。让这一切见鬼去吧。

En: Help.. someone...
Zh: “救命……有人吗……”

En: So I'm guessing this is bad.
Zh: 所以我猜，这不是件好事。

En: Well, this feels familiar.
Zh: 呃，这种感觉挺熟悉的。

En: Very. *Very* bad. *This is the end* bad.
Zh: 非常。*非常*糟糕。有*这一切都结束了*那么糟糕。

En: I'm sure it's just heartburn. Oh god...
Zh: 我肯定只是胃灼热而已。天啦……

En: No. It's many years of combined self-neglect and self-abuse.
Zh: 不。这是多年的自我忽略再加上自虐。

En: Don't go grabbing at your chest and screaming bloody murder. Keep your cool. Remember -- looking good always makes you feel better.
Zh: 别抓着你的胸口然后尖叫着什么血腥谋杀了。自己冷静一点。要记住——看起来不错的时候，自己的感觉也会变得不错。

En: We've been here before. You've got this.
Zh: 以前也有过这种状况。你能搞定的。

En: Fucking shit, I'm scared. What do I do? Who do I call?
Zh: 就听你鬼扯吧，哥们我在这儿都要吓晕了好吗。我该怎么办？要打给谁才好？

En: Nope, sorry, you don't. Not this time.
Zh: 不，不好意思，不行。这次不行。

En: Don't think this is a sign of anything other than your heart failing.
Zh: 别把它当做是心脏衰竭的信号就行。

En: The end of the world is here.
Zh: 世界末日到了。

En: Yeah, screaming isn't happening on account of extreme shortness of breath. You're just making it worse. Oh god, it's painful...
Zh: 是啊，极度呼吸急促的时候是没法尖叫的。你只是让它变得更糟糕了。天啦，真的好痛苦……

En: Get it together, boy. You've gotta hold on, no matter how bad...
Zh: 不要乱，小伙子。不管情况变得多糟糕，你也得坚持下去。

En: All you feel is pain and weakness. You have to surrender now. We all do, it gets *so* dark. You don't even see her face, like you always thought you would. You only see pain and fear.
Zh: 你能感到的只剩下疼痛和虚弱。现在你必须投降。我们都会这么做，眼前变得*如此*黑暗。你甚至看不清她的脸，就像你一直以为的那样。你只看到痛苦和恐惧。

En: Try to remain conscious.
Zh: 试着保持清醒。

En: You feel something in your chest. An unnatural pressure. It's spreading to your left arm, your jaw...
Zh: 你感到胸中有什么东西。一种不自然的压力。它慢慢朝你的左胳膊扩散，然后是你的下巴……

En: Let it all go.
Zh: 放下一切吧。

En: There's no shame in surrendering now. We all do, it gets *so* dark. You don't even see her face, like you always thought you would. You only see pain and fear.
Zh: 现在投降一点也不羞愧。我们都会这么做，眼前变得*如此*黑暗。你甚至看不清她的脸，就像你一直以为的那样。你只看到痛苦和恐惧。
